about.title: Our Origin
about.mission: "Why is so much time and anxiety necessary before finding your ideal home?" This simple question is the starting point of "Aisum". Our founders themselves experienced the conventional home search—overloaded with information, yet difficult to see what truly matters. Our challenge began from the desire to resolve this lack of transparency and inefficiency with technology and human warmth. Our mission is to support the very first step—where everyone can find a home they are truly satisfied with and begin to walk their own unique, rich life path. The AI draws the optimal map, and the experts become a reliable compass. We aspire to be your greatest partner.

hero.heading: Choose your home with confidence.
hero.lede: AiSumai brings AI analysis, expert insight, and community signal together so you can compare two shortlisted homes side by side, fairly.
hero.description: Helping renters and home buyers in Japan make confident final housing decisions through

howItWorks.title: Three steps to a confident decision.
howItWorks.subtitle: AI, experts, and community — three lenses that converge on the answer that's right for you.
howItWorks.aiDescription: Floor plan, location data, pricing, age, and risk factors. Our AI evaluates both properties on objective criteria weighted to your personal priorities.
howItWorks.aiFeature: Personalized recommendations based on your lifestyle
howItWorks.aiOverlay: Click to see AI in action
howItWorks.expertDescription: Licensed local agents add the context data alone can't provide — flagging things to watch out for and adding practical, experience-backed advice.
howItWorks.communityDescription: Browse comparisons made by people in similar situations. Seeing what others chose, and why, sharpens your own judgment.

fair.title: Compared on data, not on marketing copy.
fair.description: Listing portals optimize for clicks. AiSumai produces a fair, transparent report that lays out the good and the worrying side by side, on the same scale.

fast.title: First read in under a minute.
fast.description: Paste two URLs. Our AI extracts the key differences, scores, and risks immediately, so you have something concrete to react to instead of staring at two listings.

trusted.title: Double-checked by AI and humans.
trusted.description: On top of the AI score, verified real estate experts add their own commentary — so the call you make is backed by both technology and lived experience.

faq.subtitle: The questions we hear most often.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What types of properties can I compare?
faq.a1: You can compare any two residential properties in Japan, including apartments, houses, condominiums, and more. The service works for both rentals and properties for sale.
faq.q2: How much does it cost to use AiSumai (愛住)?
faq.a2: Basic home comparisons on AiSumai (愛住) are free. In the future, premium features such as deeper AI analysis and one-on-one expert consultations may be offered through paid plans.
faq.q3: Which real estate websites are supported for URL importing?
faq.a3: In the future, we plan to support automatic data importing from major Japanese real estate platforms including Suumo, at home, LIFULL HOME'S, and others. Currently, you can enter property information manually.
faq.q4: How accurate is the AI recommendation?
faq.a4: Our AI provides recommendations based on the data available and your stated preferences. It's designed to offer an objective analysis, but we always recommend considering the expert insights alongside the AI recommendation for a complete picture.
faq.q5: Who are the experts providing insights?
faq.a5: Our experts include licensed real estate agents, property managers, and other industry professionals in Japan. Each expert has a verified profile showing their credentials, experience, and areas of specialization.
faq.a6: By default, your property comparisons are private. You have the option to make them public to contribute to our community knowledge base, but this is entirely optional.

team.title: Our Team
